stemHtml: In accordance with EASA Flight Crew Licence requirements, the credit for multi-pilot aeroplane co-pilot time is…

options.a: 100% of the co-pilot flight time towards the total flight time required for a higher licence class.
options.b: 75% of the co-pilot flight time towards the total flight time required for a higher licence class.
options.c: 100 hours of the flying time required for a higher licence class.
options.d: 50% of the co-pilot flight time towards the total flight time required for a higher licence class.
